Recommendation: Validate DNS registration and the Management Point FQDN discovered by ConfigMgr.
Validate network path. ICMP may be blocked, so confirm with WinRM and HTTP tests.
Enable/validate WinRM or run the assessment from a context allowed to connect remotely.
Install required IIS prerequisites for Management Point: Web-Server, Windows Authentication, ISAPI Extensions, IIS 6 Metabase Compatibility and IIS 6 WMI Compatibility.
Allow required ConfigMgr client communication verbs: GET, POST, CCM_POST, HEAD and PROPFIND.
Required services should be running. Review Windows Event Logs, sitecomp.log and MP-related logs when stopped.
